_publications._publicationTitle: Quality of life in patients with neurofibromatosis type 1 and 2 in Canada.

_contextSnippet: Facial nerve scale Grade 1 NA 14 (63%) Grades 2 and 3 NA 5 (23%) Grades 5 and 6 NA 3 (14%)
resourceName: House and Brackmann facial nerve scale
details: Used to assess facial nerve function in NF2 patients: Grade 1 in 14 patients (63%), Grades 2-3 in 5 patients (23%), Grades 5-6 in 3 patients (14%).
